name: Dependency Risk
description: Advisory mod that flags dependency-risk signals from connector evidence — known vulnerabilities and dependency-manifest changes.
advises_on: Dependency-risk signals from connector evidence — known vulnerabilities and dependency-manifest changes.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Annotates dependency-risk signals; routes to a reviewer, never blocks or approves.
